hooks.command: cd /Users/MarcoG/Projects/claude-dev-kit && node packages/cli/test/integration/run.js 2>/dev/null || echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "Integration tests must pass before declaring complete. Run: node packages/cli/test/integration/run.js"}'

LAST=$(cat ~/.claude/projects/-Users-MarcoG-Projects-claude-dev-kit/last-audit 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); AGE=$(( (NOW - LAST) / 86400 )); [ $AGE -ge 7 ] && echo "⚠️  Arch audit overdue ($AGE days). Run /arch-audit before starting." || true
[ -f .claude/CLAUDE.local.md ] && echo '📌 CLAUDE.local.md exists — re-read it to restore active overrides.' || true
